queries.query: Audit our docs site for developer quickstart quality, user help, and agent-readable docs.
Design a documentation system that serves humans and agents from one source of truth.
Our README quickstart takes 20 minutes before hello world; review the docs path.
Users read the help article and still open tickets after failed checkout.
Add llms.txt and make our docs easier for coding agents to retrieve.
Review our OpenAPI and MCP tool descriptions for missing examples and retry semantics.
Define metrics for documentation quality: zero-result searches, deflection, sample tests, and retrieval evals.
Our tooltips help users but agents miss the same instructions; resolve the docs conflict.
Run a pure product accessibility audit on this checkout form.
Make this dashboard visually polished and design a better card layout.
Assess this repository's AGENTS.md, hooks, sandbox, and CI for coding-agent readiness.
Review the SDK API design and auth flow; docs are not in scope.
